mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (reg_no, patient_id, schedule_id, dept_id, staff_id, reg_time, reg_fee, status, cashier_id) VALUES (#{regNo}, #{patientId}, #{scheduleId}, #{deptId}, #{staffId}, #{regTime}, #{regFee}, #{status}, #{cashierId})
mapper.update: UPDATE registration SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
